roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X: LOVE WAIVER STATUS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/RX/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE & STATUS CONDITIONS OF RELEASE/DOP/
